emails.subject: Re: CDWR Short-Term Firm Energy Proposal
emails.body: Re: CDWR Short-Term Firm Energy Proposal Looks fine to me. What's your expectations re: Freeman paying us what he owes us? Best, Jeff

emails.subject: Re: CDWR Short-Term Firm Energy Proposal
emails.body: Re: CDWR Short-Term Firm Energy Proposal Fax number (in LA) is 213.897.9560. I don't have the address. Did we use the LA address on the original response letter delivered on 2.6.01? I can't recall. Let me know. I can call and get the address if necessary. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: Re: CDWR Short-Term Firm Energy Proposal
emails.body: He said he would, but we are asking him to pay us before the are actually due, so he might balk on that or he may have a problem with the block-forwards being lumped in there. From: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON on 02/18/2001 11:57 AM CST Sent by: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON
